room.caption: [DCSA] I've been feeling anxious lately.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(90)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backDCS_A; backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollow.yMoveScale=0.92 backFollow.image_xscale=1.65; backFollow.image_yscale=1.65 backFollow.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvDCS) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(6) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
